# Finishing Instructions

This instruction file is relevant after every change to the codebase.

Following tasks should be run successfully before finishing a todo:

1. Run `make generate` to regenerate the documentation
2. Run `make fmt` to format the code
3. Run `make lint` to run static code analysis
4. Run `make build` to build the application
5. Run `make test` and `make testacc` to run the tests
